init.description: Define time-of-use tariff windows as YAML. Leave blank to disable per-tariff statistics.

data_description.tariffs:
Each entry needs: name (string), days (list of 0=Mon–6=Sun), start_hour, end_hour (0–24). Optionally add months (list of 1–12) to restrict the window to specific months. Hours not matching any window fall into the 'default' tariff. The same name can appear in multiple entries. Example:

- name: on-peak
  days: [0, 1, 2, 3, 4]
  months: [6, 7, 8, 9]
  start_hour: 14
  end_hour: 19
- name: off-peak
  days: [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6]
  start_hour: 0
  end_hour: 14

error.invalid_schema: Schema is invalid — each entry needs a name, days (0-6), start_hour, end_hour
error.bad_hours: start_hour must be less than end_hour, both within 0-24
error.bad_months: months must be a list of integers 1–12
